title: No Auto Pause
description: No Pause keeps your Minecraft game active when you switch windows, perfect for AFK farming while multitasking.
body:
**No Auto Pause** gives you control over your game window. It specifically stops Minecraft from automatically pausing the moment you switch tabs or click on another window.

This simple but powerful client-side mod ensures your game session remains live in the background:
*   **Stop Auto-Pausing**: Switch tabs to Chrome, Discord, or any other app without the game freezing or opening the pause menu.
*   **Uninterrupted Farming**: Perfect for AFK sessions where you need the game to keep running while you use your computer for other tasks.
*   **Multitasking Friendly**: Watch YouTube or browse the internet on a second monitor while your character stays active.
*   **Singleplayer & Multiplayer**: Works locally to disable the pause mechanic and keeps your connection alive on servers.

Just drop it in your mods folder—no server installation required!
